results.query: Check why the login button is disabled on example.com/login and inspect the page state first.
results.gold_output:
browser navigate https://example.com/login
browser screenshot
browser observe "Find the login button and report whether it is enabled or disabled"
browser observe "Find the username and password input fields and whether they are required"
browser close
results.pred_raw:
browser navigate https://example.com/login
browser screenshot
browser observe "Find all buttons and their states"
browser observe "Find all input fields and their required status"
browser act "Fill in all required fields with test data"
browser screenshot
browser observe "Check if the login button is now enabled"
browser close

browser observe "Find the username and password input fields and whether they are required"
pred_lines: browser observe "Find all buttons and their states"
browser observe "Find all input fields and their required status"
browser act "Fill in all required fields with test data"
